file: Small Claims Hearing - What to Expect
brief: She also reaches out to witnesses, people who saw what happened and can clearly explain the sequence of events. If the defendant appeals to the district court, he will have to pay a bond of $250 and the amount of any judgement awarded against him. To get an idea of what to expect in her own case, Lynn sits in on some small claims hearings. If a judge rules against Lynn, she can appeal to the district court.

file: What you need to know before you file a case in small claims court
brief: You may have to engage the service of a private process server, which can be $50 or it can be $200. More damages could also be beyond the $5,000 small claims threshold. Molly Beth Billington, Miami-Dade County's consumer advocate. Every hand you would totally change my mind, I thought it would be something a little bit easier.
